title: Vanilla Overhaul
description: Experience Minecraft reimagined with a vanilla overhaul modpack featuring nearly 300 mods and 25+ resource packs! This pack enhances gameplay, visuals, and quality-of-life while preserving the classic vanilla feel. Remember to add the datapacks manually!
body:
# Vanilla Overhaul

![Vanilla Overhaul modpack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46ddec6f49a4a43e3272685b74b9d10307ee5987.png)

Experience Minecraft reimagined with a vanilla overhaul modpack featuring nearly 300 mods and 25+ resource packs! This pack enhances gameplay, visuals, and quality-of-life while preserving the classic vanilla feel. Dive into a richly improved world, where every detail adds depth without straying from the core Minecraft experience. Perfect for players who want the ultimate upgrade without sacrificing the game's original charm!

### Make sure to add these datapacks yourself!
[All Mob Heads](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/all-mob-heads)

[BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack/version/1.17.2)

[Vanilla Tweaks Crafting Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/share/#AFFWCy)

[Wandering Trades (Vanilla Tweaks)](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#BVFJ0V)

**And also these resourcepacks:**

[Armor Stands Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/armorstands-reimagined)

[Better Illagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-illagers)

Report bugs to: https://x.com/muhammadrizo_y

Colorful Containers GUI Dark:
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-dark-mode-gui](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-dark-mode-gui)
